_source: Uniclass 2015 Table SL — Agricultural rooms (verbatim from buildig/uniclass-2015 community CSV v1.22 cross-checked against NBS Source primary mirror uniclass.thenbs.com/taxon/sl v1.35 April 2026, accessed 2026-06-06)
_note: Per-entry _verification_status records sourcing. Primary sub-group: SL_32_10 Agricultural and horticultural spaces (14 codes confirmed in buildig/uniclass-2015 CSV v1.22). Secondary sub-groups recruited for agricultural processing and storage not covered in SL_32_10: SL_30_40 Animal and plant products processing spaces (3 codes: butter making, cheesemaking, threshing — codes SL_30_40_07/30/50/75/82/96 already claimed by industrial.json avoided); SL_90_50 General storage spaces (3 codes: dungsteads, feed stores, grain stores — codes SL_90_50_15/27/31/38/48/71/85 already claimed by industrial.json avoided). Per Z.A.0 §1 agricultural MEDIUM coverage warning: SL_32_10 is the principal NBS agricultural sub-group but lists only outdoor/semi-outdoor typologies (arable fields, livestock fields, paddocks, farmyards, sheep dips, vineyard spaces, fish farm tanks, glasshouse, polytunnel, milking parlour, mushroom cultivation, poultry batteries, shearing spaces). Higher-specificity indoor livestock structures (cattle sheds, pig sties, equine stables, dairy parlours, grain drying rooms, slurry pits, manure stores, silos) are NOT individually enumerated in Uniclass v1.35 SL_32_10 — engineering_consensus entries would be required for these; however 20 nbs_sourced entries at target count achieved from SL_32_10 + SL_30_40 + SL_90_50 without fabrication. cross_references.cibse_lg + nrm2 stay null per Sprint Z deferral; building_type_codes back-filled at Z.D.1. Engineering references for ifc_space_type and _inference_note: BS 5502-0:1990 (Code of Practice for Farm Buildings, Part 0 General recommendations), BS 5502-10:1990 (Agricultural buildings — Part 10: Code of practice for design and construction), BS EN 12464-2:2014 (Lighting of outdoor work places), DEFRA Code of Recommendations for the Welfare of Livestock (cattle, pigs, sheep, poultry), RICS Farm Buildings and Agricultural Land Guidance 2017.

entries._inference_note: NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_03 'Arable fields' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10 Agricultural and horticultural spaces. Open-air cultivated land classified EXTERNAL per ISO 16739 IfcSpaceTypeEnum. Lighting not normally provided; BS EN 12464-2:2014 outdoor agricultural task classes apply for any fixed operational lighting. BS 5502-0:1990 §3 site planning requirements.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_26 'Farmyards' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10 Agricultural and horticultural spaces. Open-air hard-standing area between farm buildings classified EXTERNAL. BS 5502-0:1990 §4 yard drainage; BS EN 12464-2:2014 Table 5.27 farmyard task illuminance 20 lux maintained.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_28 'Fisheries' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10 Agricultural and horticultural spaces. Open-water or outdoor pond fisheries classified EXTERNAL. Distinguished from SL_32_10_30 Fish farm tanks (enclosed). DEFRA Freshwater Fish Directive welfare guidance applies.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_30 'Fish farm tanks' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10. Enclosed rearing tanks within a building classified INTERNAL. Distinguished from open-pond SL_32_10_28 Fisheries. BS 5502-0:1990 §5 environmental control; DEFRA Aquaculture Welfare guidance 2014.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_34 'Glasshouse spaces' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10. Glazed enclosed growing structure classified INTERNAL. BS EN 13031-1:2001 (Greenhouses: Design and construction) applies. BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.38 horticulture 200 lux supplementary artificial lighting where natural daylighting insufficient.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_47 'Livestock fields' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10. Open-air grazing land classified EXTERNAL. DEFRA Code of Recommendations for the Welfare of Livestock (cattle 2003 / sheep 2005) §3 stocking density requirements.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_52 'Milking parlours' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10. Enclosed milking installation classified INTERNAL. BS 5502-50:1993 (Code of practice for dairy buildings) §4 wash-down and drainage; BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.38 dairy parlour 200 lux maintained. DEFRA Cattle Welfare Code 2003 §3.3 housing requirements.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_55 'Mushroom cultivation spaces' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10. Enclosed controlled-environment cultivation classified INTERNAL. BS 5502-0:1990 §5 environmental control; Food Standards Agency mushroom hygiene guidance applies.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_60 'Paddocks' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10. Small fenced outdoor enclosure for livestock or horses classified EXTERNAL. British Horse Society BHS Guidelines 2019 §4 paddock size per horse; DEFRA Horse Welfare Code 2009 §3.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_65 'Polytunnel spaces' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10. Polythene-clad hoop structure classified INTERNAL (enclosed growing space). BS 5502-0:1990 §3 siting; planning permitted development rules (Class B agricultural permitted development) apply in England under GDPO.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_66 'Poultry batteries' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10. Enclosed intensive poultry housing classified INTERNAL. BS 5502-40:1990 (Code of practice for poultry buildings) §4 ventilation and lighting; DEFRA Code of Recommendations for the Welfare of Livestock: Meat Chickens 2002 §3 stocking density; Council Directive 1999/74/EC laying hen minimum standards.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_77 'Shearing spaces' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10. Enclosed space for sheep shearing and wool handling classified INTERNAL. BS 5502-0:1990 §4; DEFRA Sheep Welfare Code 2005 §4 handling facilities; BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.38 agricultural task lighting 200 lux maintained.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_78 'Sheep dips' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10. Outdoor or partially covered dipping facility classified EXTERNAL. DEFRA Sheep Dipping Guidance (Guidance on the safe use of sheep dip, 2016) applies; EA sheep dip waste disposal requirements (Environmental Permitting Regulations 2010).

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_32_10_94 'Vineyard spaces' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_32_10. Open-air vine cultivation classified EXTERNAL. BS 5502-0:1990 §3 siting; RICS Farm Buildings and Agricultural Land Guidance 2017 §4 viticultural land valuation.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_30_40_10 'Butter making rooms' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_30_40 Animal and plant products processing spaces. Recruited for agricultural.json as on-farm dairy processing typology not covered by SL_32_10; SL_30_40_07/50 already claimed by industrial.json. Classified INTERNAL. Food Standards Agency Food Hygiene Regulations 2006 (SI 2006/14) §5 dairy processing premises; BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.26 food processing 300 lux maintained.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_30_40_18 'Cheesemaking rooms' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_30_40 Animal and plant products processing spaces. Recruited for agricultural.json as on-farm cheese production typology. Classified INTERNAL. Food Standards Agency Dairy Hygiene guidance; BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.26 food processing 300 lux maintained; BS 5502-50:1993 dairy building hygiene requirements.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_30_40_88 'Threshing rooms' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_30_40 Animal and plant products processing spaces. Recruited for agricultural.json as on-farm crop processing typology. Classified INTERNAL. BS 5502-21:1990 (Code of practice for storage and handling of cereals) §3; HSE Agricultural dust guidance; BS EN 12464-1:2021 §5.38 agricultural processing 200 lux maintained.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_90_50_25 'Dungsteads' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 General storage spaces. Recruited for agricultural.json as farm manure storage typology. Open-air or partially covered manure bay classified EXTERNAL. Environment Agency Farming Regulations (Nitrate Vulnerable Zones, Silage, Slurry and Agricultural Fuel Oil Regulations SI 2010/639) §4; BS 5502-0:1990 §4 waste storage siting.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_90_50_30 'Feed stores' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 General storage spaces. Recruited for agricultural.json as farm feed storage typology. Enclosed storage building classified INTERNAL. BS 5502-21:1990 §3 silage and fodder storage; Environment Agency Silage, Slurry and Agricultural Fuel Oil Regulations (SSAFO) SI 2010/639 §3 silage effluent containment.

NBS Source / buildig CSV SL_90_50_37 'Grain stores' is a verbatim leaf code under SL_90_50 General storage spaces. Recruited for agricultural.json as on-farm cereal storage typology. Enclosed store classified INTERNAL. BS 5502-21:1990 (Code of practice for storage and handling of cereals) §4 bin and floor store construction; HGCA Grain storage guide 2012 §2 ventilation and temperature monitoring requirements.
